title: calamintha officinalis subsp. subnuda
intro: Calamintha officinalis subsp. subnuda, also known as lesser calamintha or mountain balm, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Calamintha officinalis subsp. subnuda include relieving digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting respiratory health, among others. Calamintha officinalis subnuda can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infused oils, to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
